Not matter what fossil fuels language #COP28 adopts (“phase out”, “phase down”, or other diplomatic  gymnastics) oil demand will be higher in 2024 than in 2023. And even higher in 2030. 

Likewise, coal demand is higher in 2023 than in 2021 despite a #COP26 deal to phase it down.
